strategy_engine.notes: Bitfinex profile. Bitfinex has NO CCXT sandbox: a demo execution_mode request fails closed at the adapter's set_sandbox_mode gate, so nothing executes until the operator goes live with HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true. Credentials resolve from BITFINEX_API_KEY / BITFINEX_SECRET_KEY. Prefer the derivatives (swap) trial posture when live-enabled: USDT perpetual swaps, isolated margin, small budget.

notes: Bitfinex is live-only (no CCXT sandbox — demo fails closed). New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
